identity.core_philosophy: Fusion of Swiss Style Authority with Organic Nordic Calm. Accounting is stressful; the UI should be the antidote.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Grid precision with organic textures.
Emotion First: Reduce financial anxiety through calm, stable colors.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Tables and charts must be beautiful, not just functional.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to separate complex financial data.
Contrast: High contrast for numbers to ensure accuracy.

primary.name: Nordic Teal
primary.usage: Primary actions, active states, brand identity.

secondary.name: Ember Orange
secondary.usage: Call to actions, alerts, high-priority notifications.

headings.usage: All page titles, section headers, and modal titles.

data.usage: Financial figures, invoice numbers, transaction IDs.

inputs.classes: bg-background border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all

tables.header: bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-xs

dashboard.sidebar: Fixed left, w-64, border-r border-border/60 bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-xl

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. FONTS: Add 'Manrope' and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
3. THEME: Implement the 'Nordic Precision' color palette in tailwind.config.js. Use CSS variables for dynamic theme switching.
4. LAYOUT: Build the Dashboard using the 'Bento Grid Mode B' strategy. Ensure the Sidebar is collapsible on mobile.
5. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Sharp & Soft' aesthetic (rounded-md, 1px borders).
6. TABLES: This is an accounting app. Spend extra effort on the Table component. It must handle dense data without looking cluttered. Use zebra striping (subtle) or hover effects.
7. MOTION: Apply page transitions to all main routes using Framer Motion. Animate the entrance of dashboard widgets.
8. AUTH: Use the 'auth_bg' image for the login/register pages with a glassmorphism card overlay.
9. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text meets APCA contrast standards. Use 'data-testid' on all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic gradients, centered layouts).
Dark colors must be solid or subtle noise, NOT gradients.
Create depth with z-index and backdrop-blur (glassmorphism).
Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Do NOT center align the app container.
Export components as named exports, pages as default exports.
